message:
feat: add fr-server crate — standalone FrankenRedis server binary

Introduce the fr-server workspace member containing the `frankenredis`
binary.  This is the dedicated process entry point that wires the
library crates (fr-config, fr-protocol, fr-runtime) into a runnable
server.

Current scope is a minimal bootstrap: CLI argument parsing for --port
and --mode (strict/hardened), Runtime construction from RuntimePolicy,
and a stdin-based inline RESP command loop for smoke-testing the full
pipeline.  Real TCP networking is deferred to a subsequent bead.

Includes two unit tests validating runtime construction in both modes
and PING round-trip through execute_bytes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+[package]
+name = "fr-server"
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+license-file.workspace = true
+description = "FrankenRedis standalone server binary"
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "frankenredis"
+path = "src/main.rs"
+
+[dependencies]
+fr-runtime = { path = "../fr-runtime" }
+fr-config = { path = "../fr-config" }
+fr-protocol = { path = "../fr-protocol" }
